prompt: Create a soft Korean-style romantic digital portrait of a young woman standing among blooming pink chrysanthemums after a storm has passed. Use a wide horizontal canvas in a 16:9 ratio. The woman is shown from the upper body, turned slightly away in a three-quarter back view, wearing a loose translucent ivory-white blouse with a deep back neckline and delicate folds. She has very long, wind-swept dark brown hair flowing across her shoulders and toward the right side of the frame, with a small gold earring visible. Her face is intentionally obscured by a plain vertical rectangular censor block in warm medium brown skin tone, covering the entire facial area without text or features. Surround her with exactly 7 large visible pale pink chrysanthemum blossoms: 5 clustered on the left side at different heights, 1 large bloom on the lower right, and 1 smaller bloom near the mid-right edge, all attached to green stems and leaves. Set the scene against a warm beige plaster wall with soft shadows of leaves and flowers cast across it. Lighting should feel like late-afternoon golden sunlight breaking through after cloudy weather, gentle and hopeful, with warm highlights, soft contrast, painterly realism, delicate Korean web-illustration aesthetics, airy composition, natural floral detail, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
